name: funsync-player
description: Local desktop video player with Handy device integration for synchronized funscript playback

scripts.dev: concurrently "electron ." "cd backend && python3 main.py || python main.py"
scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && python3 main.py || python main.py
scripts.backend:test: cd backend && python3 -m pytest -v || python -m pytest -v

author: FunSync
